category_sources: source_facts.description says pqiv is a powerful image viewer with minimal UI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both identify the project as pqiv.
docs_sources: Official pqiv project page at pberndt.com provides the manual/features page and links back to the GitHub repository.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository, whose README is an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official pqiv page describes GTK-based image viewing features.
source_facts.description identifies an image viewer with minimal UI.
